name: System Design Basics — Framework and Estimation

hook.what_you_will_build: System Design Basics — Framework and Estimation

key_takeaways: Capacity estimation: daily÷86400=per-second; add 10x peak buffer
Always ask functional vs non-functional requirements
CAP theorem: choose CP or AP; CA = single node
Start with 1-server design, identify bottlenecks, scale each layer
